name: MCP
one_liner: A standardized tool/server protocol layer for agent systems.
tech_principle: MCP separates tool invocation from application logic and standardizes how models talk to external capabilities.
product_impl: Vendors can expose compatible servers and clients, which makes integration surfaces more reusable than one-off wrappers.
user_feedback: Teams care about portability, governance, and whether the protocol reduces integration maintenance cost.
chat_notes: Useful when comparing plugin layers, tool abstraction, and long-term agent ecosystem boundaries.
